user_intent_preservation.functional_behavior: Generate 3-phase center-aligned PWM on GTM TOM1, TGC1 with complementary outputs at 20 kHz and 1 µs dead time; map phases to P02.0/P02.7 (U), P02.1/P02.4 (V), P02.2/P02.5 (W); enable synchronous start and synchronous duty updates; provide percentage-based duties (U=25%, V=50%, W=75%) with 10% step and wrap rule; include empty IfxGtm_periodEventFunction; add GTM ATOM0 CH0 ISR (prio 20, CPU0) toggling LED P13.0 at 2 Hz; protect GTM enable with a guard (enable/configure CMU clocks only if GTM is disabled); expose initGtmTom3phInv(void) and updateGtmTom3phInvDuty(void); in main, call init once then loop update + dwell 500 ms using STM ticks.
user_intent_preservation.technical_approach: Use unified high-level IfxGtm_Pwm to configure TOM1/TGC1 six channels (pairs 8/9, 10/11, 12/13) as complementary center-aligned PWM with 1 µs dead time and synchronous start/update. Map TOUT pins to P02.x via IfxGtm_PinMap_setTomTout once the exact TOUT macros for TC38x LFBGA516 are confirmed. Guard GTM enable via IfxGtm_isEnabled before calling IfxGtm_enable and IfxGtm_Cmu_enableClocks. Update phase duties using IfxGtm_Pwm_updateChannelsDuty for synchronized updates with the wrap rule. Provide an empty IfxGtm_periodEventFunction. Configure ATOM0 CH0 as a 2 Hz tick source using IfxGtm_Atom low-level channel APIs and enable its SRC; ISR toggles LED P13.0 using IfxPort APIs. Use IfxStm to derive 500 ms dwell ticks.

driver_selection.selection_rationale: Explicit upgrade from IfxGtm_Tom_PwmHl to the unified high-level IfxGtm_Pwm meets the user’s requirement for a simpler, synchronized multi-channel configuration on TOM1 with complementary outputs and dead time. The unified driver directly supports synchronous start/update, multi-channel duty update arrays, and dead-time update, and is available in the template.

runtime_function.name: updateGtmTom3phInvDuty
runtime_function.purpose: Update U/V/W PWM duties in percent with synchronized shadow transfer and wrap rule; maintain center-aligned complementary operation.

driver_changes: Upgraded PWM from IfxGtm_Tom_PwmHl to unified IfxGtm_Pwm on TOM1/TGC1 for 3-phase complementary PWM.
api_changes: GTM enable guard via IfxGtm_isEnabled + IfxGtm_enable and IfxGtm_Cmu_enableClocks (only when GTM disabled)
migration_notes.context_preserved: The unified driver directly configures TOM1 TGC1 channels as center-aligned complementary PWM at 20 kHz, applies 1 µs dead time, starts channels synchronously, and supports synchronized multi-channel duty updates to realize the percentage-based stepping with wrap rule. The exact P02.x TOUT mappings remain TBD and will be finalized via the IfxGtm_PinMap TC38x LFBGA516 pin map. The ATOM0 CH0 ISR (prio 20) toggles P13.0 at 2 Hz using IfxPort APIs, and the main loop applies a 500 ms dwell using STM ticks. A GTM enable guard prevents unintended CMU clock reconfiguration when GTM is already enabled.

PWM.rationale: Driver locked by refiner node (user explicit or engine-scored)
